title: Alkem Laboratories Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Alkem Laboratories Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Alkem Laboratories Capital India are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Alkem Laboratories Capital India:
Alkem Laboratories Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories Capital India!
